summary: Paucigranulocytic asthmatics exhibit measurable systemic inflammation despite limited granular cell presence; this underscores their inclusion within broader categories of inflamed respiratory conditions requiring targeted therapy. The reliance on immunosuppressive treatments confirms ongoing biological activity even when traditional microscopic criteria suggest minimal inflammation.
